home.title: Explore Vietnamese Heritage
home.subtitle: Journey through Vietnam's rich culture and ancient history
home.loadingError: An error occurred while loading data

hero.title: Awaken Vietnam’s Living Memory
hero.subtitle: Explore heritage sites, dynasties, historical figures, and stories through vivid interactive experiences.
hero.slide1Subtitle: A journey through centuries of history, culture and magnificent nature.
hero.slide2Subtitle: Experience the most important historical and cultural heritage sites.
hero.slide3Subtitle: Immerse yourself in the stories that shaped our nation.

dynasty.title: Vietnam’s River of Dynasties
dynasty.description: Move through layers of time, from the Hồng Bàng legends to the imperial memory of Huế, like a flowing river of national memory.

themes.1: Cổ Loa Citadel and the legendary crossbow

features.title: Key Features
features.sectionDescription: Each feature becomes an interactive gallery where learners observe, challenge themselves, and converse with history.

knowledgeQuiz.title: Knowledge Quiz
knowledgeQuiz.description: Challenge yourself with multiple-choice questions and learn more about cultural heritage.

rolePlay.title: Role-Playing Experience
rolePlay.description: Explore history through the perspective of historical figures in important events.

mapExplore.title: Map Exploration
mapExplore.description: Search and discover historical sites on the map with the help of Google Maps.

popular.description: Representative entry points for learners to begin exploring Vietnam’s heritage.
popular.errorTitle: The collection data is not connected yet
popular.errorDescription: A curated sample collection is shown for the interface preview. Real API data will take priority as soon as it is available.
popular.emptyTitle: The gallery is waiting for data
popular.emptyDescription: Here are sample artifacts for the Home experience while the backend has no records yet.

mock-van-mieu.name: Temple of Literature
mock-van-mieu.description: A landmark of scholarship in Thăng Long, preserving Vietnam’s respect for learning and teachers.

mock-co-do-hue.name: Complex of Hue Monuments
mock-co-do-hue.description: An imperial heritage landscape along the Perfume River, blending architecture, ritual, and Nguyễn aesthetics.

mock-hoi-an.name: Hoi An Ancient Town
mock-hoi-an.description: A living museum of East Asian commerce, where timber houses, lanterns, and maritime memory meet.

mock-thanh-nha-ho.name: Ho Citadel
mock-thanh-nha-ho.description: A monumental stone citadel reflecting defensive thinking and reform during a turbulent period.

mock-my-son.name: My Son Sanctuary
mock-my-son.description: A valley of Cham temple towers, preserving ancient fired-brick techniques and spiritual traditions.

mock-den-hung.name: Hung Kings Temple Complex
mock-den-hung.description: A source-landscape tied to the worship of the Hùng Kings and the founding memory of the Vietnamese people.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.sectionDescription: A learning journey designed like a museum path: begin, discover, interact, and share.

step1.title: Sign Up
step1.description: Create an account to access all features

step3.title: Interactive Experience
step3.description: Participate in interactive activities and knowledge tests

step4.title: Share & Review
step4.description: Share your experience and review heritage sites

heritageDetail.loginToUseFeatures: Login to use all interactive and personalized features.
heritageDetail.unableToLoad: Unable to load heritage information. Please try again later.
heritageDetail.leaderboardDescription: See your ranking compared to others when exploring

chat.selectUser: Select a user to start chatting

errors.displayNameMinLength: Display name must be at least 3 characters

messages.imageTypeInvalid: Only JPEG, PNG or GIF image files are accepted

mcp.title: Access Token Management
mcp.subtitle: Access tokens allow you to connect external AI chatbots (such as Claude Desktop, ChatGPT Web, or AI-integrated IDEs) directly to your heritage account using the Model Context Protocol (MCP).
mcp.securityWarningText: Please copy this token now. For security reasons, it will only be displayed ONCE.
mcp.noTokensText: You haven't created any MCP tokens yet. Enter a name above to create your first token.
mcp.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke (delete) this token? Any AI connected using this token will lose access.
mcp.inputEmptyError: Please enter an application/AI client name
mcp.claudeText: Open your `claude_desktop_config.json` configuration file and paste the following JSON:
mcp.chatgptText: Go to Settings → Apps → Advanced, enable Developer Mode. Add a new application and fill in the SSE URL and Bearer Token parameters above.

favorites.title: Explore Your Favorite Heritage Sites
favorites.subtitle: Save and track the historical and cultural landmarks you care about most
favorites.emptyDescription: Explore historical sites and add them to your favorites to view later.
favorites.errorLoading: An error occurred while loading favorites list
favorites.errorNoFavorites: You don't have any favorites yet.

notFound.eyebrow: Lost in the flow of history

explore.title: Explore Heritage
explore.subtitle: Search the map and discover heritage sites near any location in Vietnam.
explore.tryAnotherLocation: Try searching or selecting another location on the map.

ui.initialStatus: Open “Create itinerary” to start your journey through Vietnam's heritage sites.

status.geoUnsupported: Your browser does not support geolocation.
status.geoFailed: Could not get your location. Please try again.
status.geoDenied: You haven't granted location access. Please enable location permission in your browser and try again, or pick a point on the map.
status.geoUnavailable: Could not determine your current location. Please pick a point on the map or enter an address.
status.geoTimeout: Location request timed out. Please try again.
status.geoBlocked: Location access is blocked. Please re-enable it in your browser settings, or pick a point on the map / enter an address.
status.clickOnMap: Please click on a point on the map.
status.routeSuccess: AI has designed your itinerary successfully.
status.selectProvinceFirst: Select at least one province before creating an itinerary.

planner.title: Heritage journey planner
planner.description: Choose regions, answer a few questions, then the system builds a route and explains why each stop was chosen.
planner.selectLandDesc: Select provinces to filter the map. The system will limit the route to these provinces.
planner.priorityHeritageDesc: These are the sites you definitely want to visit. Close this dialog, click a marker on the map to view it and "Add to itinerary".
planner.minimizeToPick: Minimize to pick points directly on the map
planner.aiUnderstandsDesc: Answer quickly so the system can pick sites that match your group, pace, weather, and air quality.
planner.departureDesc: Type an address, choose a suggestion, or use the location feature.
planner.selectedNotice: ✓ {{count}} point(s) selected — the system will route through these points.
planner.startPointPlaceholder: Search an address or place name...
planner.endPointPlaceholder: Leave empty to return to the start point

envs.indoor: Prefer indoor when AQI is poor
envs.outdoor: Prefer outdoor when weather is nice

validation.missingProvince: Please select at least one province
validation.missingSite: Please select at least one heritage site
validation.missingInterest: Please select at least one interest
validation.invalidPeople: Number of people must be greater than 0

detail.noReviews: No reviews yet. More will be added when data is available.

route.freeDay: Free day — Explore local cuisine, wander markets, take photos
route.defaultReason: Matches your interests and the selected heritage region.

warnings.split: Stops are split along a North-South axis to balance each day.
warnings.osrm: One segment is using a temporary estimate because route data isn't ready yet.
warnings.islandRoute: Island destination detected — road routing unavailable, straight-line displayed. Please use ferry/boat for travel.

playback.narrationPrompt: Would you like to hear information and history about this place?
playback.noNarration: There is no narration available for this place yet.
playback.narrationError: Error loading information. Please try again later.
playback.skipAllTitle: Stop showing narration popups at each stop

onboarding.step1Desc: Explore over 1300 heritage sites across 63 provinces. Click a marker to see details.
onboarding.step2Desc: Press "Create itinerary" to choose regions, interests, and let the AI design an optimal tour route for you.
onboarding.step3Desc: Filter heritage by category: history, spirituality, architecture, nature, museums, craft villages...
onboarding.step4Desc: Type a heritage or province name to search quickly. Select a result to fly to that location on the map.

about.connectingPast: Connecting the Past with the Present
about.journeyDescription: From idea to reality, our journey is a testament to our passion for cultural heritage and technology.
about.valuesDescription: The principles and values that guide all our activities in the journey of cultural heritage preservation.
about.teamDescription: Meet the passionate and talented people behind the Heritage project.
about.joinDescription: Become part of the journey to preserve and promote the values of Vietnamese cultural heritage.
about.contactDescription: We are always ready to listen to your feedback and answer your questions. Contact us through the following channels:
about.missionText: The Heritage project was born with the mission to preserve, promote and spread the cultural and historical values of the nation to the community, especially the younger generation through modern technology platforms.
about.visionText: Become the leading platform for preserving and promoting the value of Vietnamese cultural heritage, connecting people with national history through modern technology.
about.missionDetailText: Use technology to preserve, spread and educate about Vietnamese cultural heritage, creating interactive and engaging experiences for users.

accuracy.title: Accuracy
accuracy.description: Committed to providing accurate, reliable and thoroughly researched information about cultural heritage.

preservation.title: Preservation
preservation.description: Prioritizing the preservation and respect for cultural heritage values in all activities.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Continuously innovating and applying advanced technology to create engaging learning experiences.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Building collaborative relationships with experts, organizations and communities to develop the platform.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Committed to creating a platform that is accessible to everyone, regardless of age or background.

education.title: Education
education.description: Focusing on education, inspiring the younger generation about the value of national cultural heritage.

item1.title: Origin of Idea
item1.description: The idea of a platform combining technology and cultural heritage was formed, with the goal of creating a new experience for users when learning about historical sites.

item2.title: Research and Development
item2.description: In-depth research phase on Vietnamese historical sites, while developing interactive technologies to create the best user experience.

item3.title: Beta Release
item3.description: The beta version of the platform was launched with basic features, receiving much positive feedback from the community.

item4.title: Expansion and Growth
item4.description: The platform was comprehensively developed with many new features such as role-playing experience, interactive map, virtual assistant and an ever-expanding user community.

teamBios.bio1: With over 3 years of experience in website development.
teamBios.bio2: Technology researcher with experience in designing robust databases using modern technologies.
teamBios.bio3: Passionate about building scalable web applications and working with cross-functional teams.

map.title: The Đông A Spirit — The Trần Dynasty Against the Mongols
map.description: Explore the three resistance wars against the Mongols (1258 · 1285 · 1288) through a dynamic map and a knowledge network of figures, events and sites. Drag the timeline or open graph mode to see every connection.
map.emptyGraph: Select a node in the graph to see its relation network.
map.emptyMap: Select a place on the map to see its historical relation network.
map.footerNote: The map fully depicts the Hoàng Sa and Trường Sa archipelagos under Vietnam's sovereignty. Historical data is served from the knowledge graph via API.

persona.q1: How did you defeat the Mongol army?
persona.q2: What was your secret to defending the nation?
persona.q3: Tell me about the battle you are most proud of.
persona.greetingHint: Ask me about the times, warfare, or the land of Đại Việt.

trip.emptyDesc: No journeys yet. Turn on <1>Record journey</1> while exploring heritage sites to save your route, photos and stats.
trip.communityDesc: Discover heritage journeys shared by the community — explore routes, moments and inspiration for your next trip.
trip.emptyCommunity: No public journeys yet. Be the first to share one!
trip.loginToRelive: Log in to relive this journey.
trip.tripNamePlaceholder: e.g. A stroll around Vinh Nghiem Pagoda
trip.tooShort: Journey is too short to save.

passport.title: Heritage Passport
passport.description: Earn XP, keep your exploration streak alive, and collect heritage stamps from the places you've visited.
passport.addStampHintBefore: Want a new stamp? Open a
passport.emptyStampsBefore: No stamps yet. Visit a heritage page and
passport.communityEmpty: No one has shared a public visit yet. Be the first!
passport.geoFailed: Couldn't get your location: {{message}}. You can use demo mode instead.
passport.photoUploadFailed: Photo upload failed; checking in without a photo.
passport.tooFar: You're too far from the heritage site.
passport.alreadyToday: You've already checked in at this site today.
passport.checkInFailed: Check-in failed, please try again later.
passport.demoMode: Demo mode (simulate being at the site — for testing)
passport.gpsRequiredHint: GPS location (or demo mode) is required to verify you've reached the site.

chatbot.title: Heritage Assistant
chatbot.tagline: I'm here to help you explore Vietnam's heritage.
chatbot.askHint: Ask me about heritage sites, dynasties, or historical figures.
chatbot.welcomeLong: Hi, I'm the Heritage Assistant. Ask me about Vietnam's historical sites and I'll answer with wiki sources and original documents you can verify.
chatbot.noSources: No clear sources available to display yet.
chatbot.verifyPrompt:
Verify this answer against the sources in the knowledge base. State clearly which parts are certain and which need more documentation:

{{content}}
chatbot.deeperPrompt:
Explain this answer in more depth, still based only on the existing knowledge base:

{{content}}
chatbot.shorterPrompt:
Summarize this answer into 3 main points, concise and easy to understand:

{{content}}
chatbot.q1: Where is the Imperial Citadel of Thang Long located?
chatbot.q2: What is the historical significance of the Cu Chi Tunnels?
chatbot.q3: In what year did UNESCO recognize the Complex of Hue Monuments?
chatbot.q4: Which historic victory is associated with Bach Dang?
chatbot.disclaimer: Information is for reference only and provided by Artificial Intelligence
chatbot.errorMessage: Sorry, an error occurred while searching the heritage knowledge base. Please try again later.
chatbot.cannotAnswer: Sorry, I cannot answer this question at the moment.
